comment: Expansion #4 Step-2 fan-out, shape B (dict->list[str]). Transcribed verbatim from scraper_blackbasin.py inline CALIBER_PATHS on 2026-06-14, parity-proven byte-identical before flip. REQUESTS-BASED scraper (Shopify per-collection /products.json feed via urllib — no browser, no page navigation), so it does NOT use the shared Playwright redirect guard or report_empty_first_pages; it keeps its own correct requests-appropriate drift guard (successful_calibers==0 -> fatal return 1). .223 and 5.56 live in two separate Shopify collections; both bucket to 223-556 and seen_ids (variant SKU) dedups cross-listed SKUs. Paths here carry NO /products.json suffix — the scraper appends it. Not yet harness-validated; validation null until Step-3. Approved by Jon, Step-2 fan-out, 2026-06-14.
